block_03: We are happy to inform you that you’ve successfully passed the assessment, which means you’re one step closer to getting a funded account at Sabiotrade. Way to go!
block_04: Now it’s time to sign the Trader’s Agreement, pass the AML/KYC, and set up your live account.
block_05: Please be on the lookout for an email from DEEL with further instructions! It will include important details on how to sign the Agreement and choose a preferred withdrawal method.
block_06: You'll receive your live account credentials within 24-48 hours after signing the Agreement.
block_11: Disclaimer: Trading carries a high level of risk, and may not be suitable for everyone. Past performance is not indicative of future results. Before getting involved in trading, you should carefully consider your personal objectives, level of education/experience, and risk appetite. You must be aware that the possibility exists that you could sustain a loss of some or all of your initial deposit and therefore, you should not trade with funds which you cannot afford to lose. The information contained in this email does not constitute financial advice in any form, nor is it a solicitation to buy or sell any Forex contract or securities of any type. We will not accept liability for any loss or damage, including without limitation any loss of profit, which may arise directly or indirectly from use of or reliance on such information.
